login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: 360° retail management for your store.
login.googleLoginError: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
login.googleLoginCanceled: Google sign-in was cancelled or failed.

signup.heroSubtitle: No tech expertise required. We promise.
signup.name: Name
signup.signupSuccess: Sign up successfully! Please check your email for the verification code.
signup.signupError: Sign up failed. Please try again.

verify.title: Verify email
verify.description: Enter your email and the 6-digit code sent to your inbox to activate your account.
verify.resend: Didn't receive the email? Resend code
verify.success: Email verified successfully. You can sign in now.
verify.error: Unable to verify email. Please check the OTP code.
verify.resendSuccess: Verification code resent. Please check your inbox.
verify.resendError: Unable to resend code. Please try again later.

request.title: Forgot password
request.description: Enter your account email. We'll send a 6-digit verification code to reset your password.
request.success: If the email exists, a verification code has been sent. Please check your inbox.
request.error: Unable to send reset code. Please try again later.
request.securityNote: For security, we always show a generic message even if the email does not exist in the system.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email and set a new password for your account.
reset.error: Unable to reset password. Please check the verification code.
